title: CycloneSEQ Library Construction and Sequencing Protocol for Isolated Bacteria
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7p5fa","text":"CycloneSEQ, a novel nanopore sequencing platform developed by BGI-Research, is designed to generate large-scale long-reads. This technology can be applied in diverse fields, including plant, animal, and microbial research. This protocol collection focuses on CycloneSEQ library construction and sequencing for isolated bacteria.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e67le","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
